title: Guaranteed Metric
description: Performance metrics that support minimum rate guarantees on media buys.

enumDescriptions.viewability: Viewable impression rate. Requires a viewability_standard (MRC or GroupM). Denominator is measurable_impressions.
enumDescriptions.completion_rate: Video or audio completion rate. Denominator is total impressions.
enumDescriptions.brand_safety: Brand-safe impression rate. Denominator is total impressions.
enumDescriptions.attention_score: Attention score rate from attention measurement vendors (e.g., Adelaide, Lumen). Denominator is measurable_impressions.
